name: Hamsa Yoga
formation: Jupiter in own sign (Sagittarius/Pisces) or exaltation (Cancer) in a kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th house)
description: Most auspicious Mahapurusha yoga - creates a swan-like person of great wisdom
personality: Swan-like grace, philosophical, wise, ethical, spiritual, charitable, respected, dignified
physical: Fair complexion, beautiful eyes, attractive face, medium to tall height, well-proportioned body
wealth: Good wealth through righteous means, charitable nature
spirituality: Highly spiritual, philosophical, interested in dharma and moksha
lifeEvents: Respected life, good education, spiritual growth, teaching others

results.strong: Exceptional wisdom, high status, spiritual leader, great wealth, long prosperous life
results.moderate: Good wisdom, respected position, comfortable wealth, spiritual inclination
results.weak: Some wisdom, decent reputation, moderate success

vedicReferences: Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra - Chapter on Mahapurusha Yogas
remedies: Strengthen Jupiter through worship, yellow sapphire, Thursday fasting

name: Malavya Yoga
formation: Venus in own sign (Taurus/Libra) or exaltation (Pisces) in a kendra
description: Creates a person of great beauty, luxury, and artistic talents
personality: Beautiful, artistic, romantic, pleasure-loving, diplomatic, charming, graceful
physical: Very attractive, beautiful face, lustrous eyes, fair complexion, well-built body, graceful movements
wealth: Excellent wealth, luxury items, vehicles, properties, comforts
relationships: Very successful in love and marriage, attractive spouse, romantic life
lifeEvents: Luxurious life, artistic achievements, romantic successes, material comforts

results.strong: Extraordinary beauty, artistic genius, great wealth, luxury life, perfect marriage
results.moderate: Good looks, artistic skills, comfortable wealth, happy relationships
results.weak: Pleasant appearance, some artistic ability, decent comforts

vedicReferences: Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra - Mahapurusha Yogas
remedies: Strengthen Venus through Lakshmi worship, diamond/white sapphire, Friday rituals

name: Sasa Yoga
formation: Saturn in own sign (Capricorn/Aquarius) or exaltation (Libra) in a kendra
description: Creates a person of great discipline, leadership, and longevity
personality: Disciplined, serious, hardworking, patient, organized, authoritative, responsible
physical: Medium to tall height, strong body, serious face, mature appearance, commanding presence
wealth: Wealth through hard work, property, land, industrial ventures, slow but steady accumulation
longevity: Excellent longevity, strong health in old age
lifeEvents: Rise through hard work, authority positions, property gains, respected elder

results.strong: Great leadership, high authority, long life, vast property, industrial success
results.moderate: Good discipline, management skills, property gains, decent longevity
results.weak: Some discipline, moderate success, average longevity

vedicReferences: Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra - Mahapurusha Yogas
remedies: Strengthen Saturn through Shani mantras, blue sapphire (careful), Saturday service

name: Ruchaka Yoga
formation: Mars in own sign (Aries/Scorpio) or exaltation (Capricorn) in a kendra
description: Creates a warrior-like person of great courage and strength
personality: Courageous, energetic, aggressive, commanding, independent, adventurous, competitive
physical: Strong muscular body, reddish complexion, athletic build, sharp features, energetic presence
wealth: Wealth through courage, property, land, competitive ventures, victory over opponents
courage: Exceptional bravery, fearless nature, victory in competitions and battles
lifeEvents: Military honors, sports victories, property gains, leadership roles

results.strong: Military honors, exceptional courage, great property, victory in all endeavors, athletic excellence
results.moderate: Good courage, property gains, competitive success, leadership abilities
results.weak: Some courage, moderate property, decent competitive spirit

vedicReferences: Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra - Mahapurusha Yogas
remedies: Strengthen Mars through Hanuman worship, red coral, Tuesday fasting

name: Bhadra Yoga
formation: Mercury in own sign (Gemini/Virgo) or exaltation (Virgo) in a kendra
description: Creates a person of exceptional intelligence and communication skills
personality: Intelligent, witty, communicative, analytical, versatile, humorous, learned, diplomatic
physical: Attractive appearance, expressive face, youthful looks, medium height, agile body
wealth: Wealth through intellect, business, trade, writing, multiple income sources
intelligence: Exceptional mental abilities, quick learning, analytical skills, versatility
lifeEvents: Educational achievements, business success, writing recognition, intellectual leadership

results.strong: Genius intellect, business empire, writing fame, versatile excellence, great wealth
results.moderate: Good intelligence, business success, communication skills, comfortable wealth
results.weak: Decent intelligence, moderate business, some communication ability

vedicReferences: Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra - Mahapurusha Yogas
remedies: Strengthen Mercury through Vishnu worship, emerald, Wednesday fasting

name: Gaja Kesari Yoga
formation: Moon and Jupiter in mutual kendras (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th from each other)
description: Elephant-Lion yoga - creates strength, wisdom, and prosperity
personality: Wise, virtuous, prosperous, influential, respected, kind, intelligent
physical: Commanding presence, attractive appearance, strong body
wealth: Excellent prosperity, multiple income sources, wealth from righteous means

results.strong: Exceptional fame, great prosperity, high leadership, virtuous life, lasting impact
results.moderate: Good reputation, comfortable wealth, respected position, ethical life
results.weak: Some recognition, moderate prosperity, decent character

vedicReferences: Widely mentioned in classics as highly beneficial yoga
remedies: Strengthen both Jupiter and Moon through respective worship and gemstones

name: Budha Aditya Yoga
formation: Sun and Mercury conjunct in same sign
description: Intelligence and authority combined - sharp intellect with power
personality: Intelligent, articulate, logical, authoritative in knowledge, learned
wealth: Good wealth through intellect and authority positions

results.strong: Intellectual authority, government educational positions, writing recognition, sharp mind
results.moderate: Good intellect, decent authority, communication skills, educational success
results.weak: Some intelligence, moderate communication, basic educational achievement

vedicReferences: Classical texts on planetary combinations
remedies: Balance Sun and Mercury energies, careful with gemstones

name: Neecha Bhanga Raja Yoga
formation: Debilitation cancellation through specific conditions: (1) Dispositor of debilitated planet in kendra, (2) Planet exalted in debilitation sign occupies kendra, (3) Lord of debilitation and exaltation signs in kendras, (4) Debilitated planet aspected by its dispositor
description: Cancellation of debilitation creates sudden rise after struggles - rags to riches
personality: Resilient, transformative, rises from difficulties, hidden strengths emerge
lifePattern: Initial struggles followed by dramatic rise and success
career: Success in area of debilitated planet after overcoming obstacles
wealth: Sudden wealth gains, rise from poverty to prosperity possible

results.strong: Dramatic transformation, rags to riches, exceptional success after struggles, lasting impact
results.moderate: Good recovery from difficulties, decent rise, success after initial obstacles
results.weak: Some improvement over debilitation, moderate success

specialNote: Often more powerful than normal exaltation as person develops special resilience
vedicReferences: Extensively discussed in BPHS for cancellation conditions
remedies: Strengthen both debilitated planet and its dispositor

name: Raja Yoga
formation: Lords of kendra houses (1, 4, 7, 10) and trikona houses (1, 5, 9) in relationship - conjunction, mutual aspect, or exchange
description: Royal combination creating power, authority, and high status
personality: Royal nature, authoritative, confident, leader, influential
wealth: Excellent wealth and prosperity, multiple sources, lasting fortune

results.strong: Very high status, great authority, substantial wealth, lasting fame, political success
results.moderate: Good position, respected authority, comfortable wealth, decent recognition
results.weak: Some authority, moderate wealth, limited recognition

vedicReferences: Primary yoga for status and authority in all classics
remedies: Strengthen both participating lords

name: Dhana Yoga
formation: Lords of wealth houses (2nd and 11th) in relationship, or with 9th lord (fortune)
description: Wealth combination creating financial prosperity
personality: Prosperous, financially successful, good at wealth management
wealth: Excellent wealth accumulation, multiple income sources, financial security

results.strong: Great wealth, multiple income sources, financial empire, lasting prosperity
results.moderate: Good wealth, comfortable income, financial security, decent savings
results.weak: Some wealth, moderate income, basic financial stability

vedicReferences: Wealth yogas detailed in classics
remedies: Strengthen wealth house lords and Jupiter

name: Viparita Raja Yoga
formation: Lords of dusthana houses (6, 8, 12) in relationship with each other, in dusthanas
description: Adversity turns to success - gains from enemies, obstacles, and difficulties
personality: Resilient, transforms difficulties, gains from adversities, strategic
lifePattern: Obstacles become opportunities, enemies become stepping stones
wealth: Gains from unexpected sources, through overcoming obstacles, from enemies' failures
weaknesFactors: Benefic aspects reducing the dusthana effect

results.strong: Major success from adversities, enemies destroyed, great gains from obstacles
results.moderate: Good ability to overcome difficulties, some gains from adversities
results.weak: Some resilience, moderate ability to turn obstacles to opportunities

vedicReferences: Paradoxical yoga discussed in advanced texts
remedies: Allow natural unfolding, strengthen participating lords

name: Lakshmi Yoga
formation: 9th lord strong in own sign or exaltation in a kendra or trikona
description: Goddess Lakshmi's blessings - fortune, wealth, and prosperity
personality: Fortunate, prosperous, righteous, blessed, dharmic, lucky
wealth: Exceptional wealth and prosperity through fortune and divine grace
spirituality: Strong dharmic inclination, righteous path, divine blessings

results.strong: Exceptional fortune, great wealth, divine blessings, righteous prosperity, lasting abundance
results.moderate: Good fortune, comfortable wealth, decent luck, dharmic life
results.weak: Some fortune, moderate prosperity, basic luck

vedicReferences: Fortune and prosperity yoga in classics
remedies: Lakshmi worship, strengthen 9th lord, Jupiter, and Venus

name: Saraswati Yoga
formation: Jupiter, Venus, and Mercury in kendras, trikonas, or 2nd house; Jupiter strong
description: Goddess Saraswati's blessings - knowledge, wisdom, arts, and learning
personality: Learned, wise, artistic, scholarly, cultured, eloquent, knowledgeable
wealth: Wealth through knowledge, arts, teaching, and scholarly pursuits
education: Exceptional educational achievements, mastery in multiple subjects

results.strong: Exceptional scholarship, artistic mastery, cultural authority, teaching excellence, lasting fame
results.moderate: Good education, artistic abilities, teaching skills, scholarly recognition
results.weak: Decent learning, some artistic ability, basic scholarly pursuits

vedicReferences: Knowledge and arts yoga in classical texts
remedies: Saraswati worship, strengthen Jupiter, Venus, and Mercury

name: Chandra Mangala Yoga
formation: Moon and Mars conjunct or in mutual aspect
description: Wealth through effort - combination of mind and action
wealth: Good wealth through active efforts, business, property, and determined action

results.strong: Substantial wealth through business, property success, energetic prosperity
results.moderate: Good earning ability, decent business success, property gains
results.weak: Some earning ability, moderate business success

vedicReferences: Wealth yoga through Mars-Moon combination
remedies: Strengthen both Moon and Mars

name: Adhi Yoga
formation: Benefic planets (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury) in 6th, 7th, and/or 8th house from Moon
description: Prosperity, authority, and longevity through benefic placements
wealth: Good prosperity and wealth, victory over financial obstacles

results.strong: Great prosperity, high authority, excellent longevity, complete victory over enemies
results.moderate: Good prosperity, decent authority, good health, success over obstacles
results.weak: Some prosperity, moderate authority, decent health

vedicReferences: Prosperity yoga in classical texts
remedies: Strengthen benefic planets from Moon

name: Vasumati Yoga
formation: Benefic planets in upachaya houses (3, 6, 10, 11) from lagna or Moon
description: Increasing wealth and prosperity through benefic growth
personality: Prosperous over time, growing success, accumulating wealth
wealth: Steadily increasing wealth, good accumulation over time

results.strong: Excellent accumulation, steadily growing wealth, prosperous life
results.moderate: Good growth, decent accumulation, comfortable prosperity

vedicReferences: Wealth accumulation yoga
remedies: Strengthen benefics in upachaya houses

name: Parivartana Yoga
formation: Two planets exchange signs (each in other's sign)
description: Mutual exchange creating connection between houses and effects
effects: Effects depend on houses exchanged - Maha (great), Khala (bad), Dainya (misery)

types.effects: Excellent - combines power and fortune, rajayoga-like effects
Mixed - some difficulties but also growth and gains
Difficult - health, debt, loss issues but can give hidden strength

results.mahaPlanet: Excellent rajayoga effects, high status, prosperity, success
results.khala: Mixed results, some struggles but also growth and gains
results.dainya: Difficulties in health, finance, but resilience and hidden strengths

vedicReferences: Exchange yogas in classical texts
remedies: Depends on type - strengthen both planets for Maha, careful remedies for Dainya

name: Kahala Yoga
formation: 4th and 9th lords in mutual kendras
description: Drum-like prosperity - property and fortune combined
personality: Fortunate, comfortable, prosperous in property matters
wealth: Excellent property and vehicle wealth, comfortable prosperity

results.strong: Excellent property wealth, luxury vehicles, very comfortable life, mother's strong blessings
results.moderate: Good property, vehicles, comfortable life, mother's support
results.weak: Some property, decent comforts, basic prosperity

vedicReferences: Property and fortune yoga
remedies: Strengthen 4th and 9th lords

name: Amala Yoga
formation: Benefic planets (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, waxing Moon) in 10th house from lagna or Moon
description: Pure reputation and lasting fame - spotless character
personality: Pure character, ethical, respected, famous for good deeds, virtuous
reputation: Excellent reputation, spotless character, lasting good name

results.strong: Exceptional reputation, lasting fame, pure character, highly respected, ethical icon
results.moderate: Good reputation, respected name, ethical character, decent fame
results.weak: Decent reputation, some respect, basic good name

vedicReferences: Reputation yoga in classics
remedies: Maintain ethical conduct, strengthen benefics in 10th

name: Parvata Yoga
planet: Benefics in kendras and 6th/8th lords weak
formation: Benefics in all kendras and 6th/8th lords debilitated or weak
description: Mountain-like stability and high status
personality: Stable like mountain, high status, generous, respected, charitable

results.strong: Very high status, mountain-like stability, great wealth, extensive charity, lasting fame
results.moderate: Good status, decent stability, comfortable wealth, some charitable work
results.weak: Some status, moderate stability, basic prosperity

vedicReferences: High status yoga in classics
remedies: Strengthen benefics in kendras, weaken malefic influences
